changelog:
Introduced a Core Lock System to prevent profile switching until initial setup is completed, protecting users from accidental data loss.
Added First-Time Setup Initialization, automatically cloning existing GTA V mod folders into Game Build 1 for a safe starting point.
Implemented a new cripcore.ini system stored in the GTA V directory to manage core settings and persistence.
Added Update Notification Settings, allowing users to toggle alerts for CripCore, ScriptHookV, ScriptHookVDotNet, RageNativeUI, LemonUI and LSPDFR.
Improved update detection system with smarter version tracking and reduced false positives.
Added safeguards to prevent corrupted or incomplete profiles from being loaded.
Settings are now stored persistently outside the app (no reliance on localStorage).
Enhanced Core Settings page with interactive toggles for update notifications.
Improved overall stability and structure of profile management system.
Added a Core Downloads page, which allows CripCore users to download file's we have edited (More to come on this).
bugfixes:
Fixed an issue when launching the game where CripCore would sometimes override RagePluginHook. This has been resolved and should now launch correctly.
Fixed an issue when launching the game where CripCore message ERR_SYS_LOADFILE would popup. This has been resolved and should now launch correctly.
Fixed an issue where CripCore would occasionally remove ELS.ini. This has now been resolved.
